title: So What
description: The best modpack for a improved vanilla expierience, intended for everything!
body:
## So what

### This modpack adds
+ prebuilt useful resource packs
+ ultimate optimization
+ free cam, replaymod
+ fresh animations for the player, and mobs
+ built in shader support
+ ability to create simple vanilla servers, using lan.

The best modpack for a optimized, 
improved vanilla expierience, good for content 
creation (freecam,replaymod). Intended for everything, the limit is your
imagination
